title: Caramelized Mediterranean Cashews Stir-fry
description: This sweet and light mediterranean dish features cashews caramelized with heavy cream in a vibrant sauce that pairs well with a variety of dishes.

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: additional for brushing on cashews if needed

instructions: Place the cashews in a saucepan with salt and enough water to cover them.
Boil until soft, about 10 minutes. Drain and set aside.
In another pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add chopped garlic and red and green peppers. Sauté for 2-3 minutes or until the peppers are slightly softened but still crisp.
Pour in heavy cream and bring to a simmer. Reduce by half (about 5 minutes), stirring occasionally.
Add drained cashews and white wine/vermouth. Stir well, allowing the sauce to thicken further.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley before serving.
